steps: Verify route 'houses/:id' is registered in packages/web/app/routes.ts pointing to routes/houses.$id.tsx
Verify houses.$id.tsx fetches house data using getHouse from firestore
Verify the page displays house title, address, description, and price
Verify the page shows a specs grid with bedrooms, bathrooms, area, lot size, stories
Verify the page shows house type badge and status badge
Verify the page has a Reserve button for authenticated users
Verify the page has a Contact Company / Message button

description: HouseCard component displays house listing information
steps: Verify HouseCard component exists at packages/web/components/HouseCard.tsx
Verify it displays house cover image, title, price, and address
Verify it shows house type badge (detached, villa, etc.)
Verify it shows bedroom, bathroom, and lot size specs
